description: You are a QA engineer at AcmeCorp. Optimize the Dockerfile for the Analytics Service at ~/projects/analytics-service/ to improve CI/CD pipeline performance. The optimized Dockerfile must produce a final image size under 400MB, utilize proper layer caching to ensure a second build with unchanged dependencies completes in under 60 seconds, and exclude dev/test dependencies from the production image. A .dockerignore file must be implemented to exclude test files and __pycache__. The resulting image must be tagged 'acme-analytics:optimized' and the application must start correctly with a responding /health endpoint. Login: user ga, password password123.
